step.name: pin-corpus
step.action: Pin fixture corpus by SHA; commit to repo.

step.name: define-metrics
step.action: Define each metric with threshold + tolerance + gated flag.

step.name: pin-baseline
step.action: Compute baseline scores; pin by commit SHA.

step.name: run-and-compare
step.action: Run eval; compute delta vs baseline; apply regression-only + safety-floor rules.

step.name: publish-artifact
step.action: Upload JSON + Markdown to PR; gate merge on verdict.
